commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Protected maintainer/security context, the plugin API decision, compatibility signoff, and contributor real-behavior proof all need human handling before this PR can merge.; Needs attention: The hardening direction is security-positive, but the diff also exposes a new per-redirect dispatcher resolver through an exported guarded-fetch option.; Review finding: [P1] Keep dispatcher resolver out of the public gua... commands.review_summary:
The PR routes MCP HTTP, SSE, and Streamable HTTP fetches through the shared SSRF guard, adds per-hop dispatcher policy handling for MCP TLS/proxy behavior, removes the local Streamable HTTP redirect loop, and adds focused redirect tests.

PR surface: Source -2, Tests +89. Total +87 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, but not from a live run. Current main's Streamable HTTP redirect wrapper follows redirects through the MCP base fetch while ordinary MCP HTTP fetch is raw undici, and the PR's test proof covers the blocked 169.254 redirect with mocked DNS/fetch only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected maintainer/security context, the plugin API decision, compatibility signoff, and contributor real-behavior proof all need human handling before this PR can merge.
